name: level1c4pps

metadata.name: level1c4pps
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: Tools to convert various satellite level-1 data formats to NWCSAF/PPS level-1c format

documentation:
level1c4pps
===========

[![Build status](https://github.com/foua-pps/level1c4pps/workflows/CI/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://github.com/foua-pps/level1c4pps/workflows/CI/badge.svg?branch=master)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/foua-pps/level1c4pps/badge.svg)](https://coveralls.io/github/foua-pps/level1c4pps?branch=master)


Tools to generate NWCSAF/PPS level-1C formattet netCDF files from various
agency specific level-1 formats. So far, supports

 - EUMETSAT Meteosat Second Generation SEVIRI HRIT level-1.5
 - NOAA AVHRR GAC
 - MERSI-2/3 level-1
 - MODIS level-1
 - AVHRR eps level-1b
 - AVHRR AAPP level-1b
 - VIIRS level-1b
 - SLSTR level-1b
 - EPS-SG MetImage level-1 test data
 - EUMETSAT AVHRR GAC FDR

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.load_and_calibrate
documentation:
Load and calibrate data.

Uses inter-calibration coefficients from Meirink et al.

Args:
    filenames: List of data files
    rotate: Rotate image so that pixel (0, 0) is N-W.
    clip_calib: If True, do not extrapolate calibration coefficients beyond
        the time coverage of the calibration dataset. Instead, clip at the
        boundaries.

Returns:
    Satpy scene holding calibrated channels

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.get_lonlats
documentation: Get lat/lon coordinates.

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.get_solar_angles
documentation:
Compute solar angles.

Compute angles for each scanline using their acquisition time to account for
the earth's rotation over the course of one scan.

Returns:
    Solar azimuth angle, Solar zenith angle in degrees

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.get_satellite_angles
documentation:
Compute satellite angles.

Returns:
    Satellite azimuth angle, Satellite zenith angle in degrees

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.set_attrs
documentation: Set global and band attributes.

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.get_mean_acq_time
documentation: Compute mean scanline acquisition time over all bands.

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.update_coords
documentation: Update band coordinates.

functions.name: level1c4pps.seviri2pps_lib.add_ancillary_datasets
documentation:
Add ancillary datasets to the scene.

Args:
    lons: Longitude coordinates
    lats: Latitude coordinates
    sunz: Solar zenith angle
    satz: Satellite zenith angle
    azidiff: Absolute azimuth difference angle
    chunks: Chunksize

Author(s):
Nina.Hakansson

functions.name: level1c4pps.calibration_coefs.get_calibration
documentation:
Get MODIS-intercalibrated gain and offset for specific time.

Args:
    platform: Platform name.
    time: Date or time of observations to be calibrated.
    clip: If True, do not extrapolate calibration coefficients beyond the
        time coverage of the calibration dataset. Instead, clip at the
        boundaries, that means return the boundary coefficients for
        timestamps outside the coverage.

functions.name: level1c4pps.calibration_coefs._get_single_channel_calibration
documentation:
Get calibration coefficients for a single channel.

Args:
    platform: Platform name.
    channel: Channel name.
    time: Observation date or time.
    clip: Clip at time coverage boundaries of the calibration dataset.

functions.name: level1c4pps.calibration_coefs.calib_meirink
documentation:
Get MODIS-intercalibrated gain and offset for SEVIRI VIS channels.

Reference: https://msgcpp.knmi.nl/solar-channel-calibration.html

:returns: gain, offset [mW m-2 sr-1 (cm-1)-1]

functions.name: level1c4pps.compose_filename
documentation:
Compose output filename.

As default use the start and end time of the scene.
For SEVIRI this is the nominal timestamp of the scan (as in the HRIT files).
If a scene band is supplied use that for start/end time.

Args:
    scene: satpy scene
    outpath: output directory (string)
    instrument: lower case instrument (string)
    band: use start and end time from band if supplied
